name: on linReceiveError
title: on linReceiveError
description: The event procedure on linReceiveError is called when an error occurred during a frame transmission. The exact reason of the error is specified by lin_StateReason selector.
The keyword this and the selectors can be used to access the data of the event that has just been received.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
